subject: Erie Insurance Claim A00006258004 — Dustin Tran — Settlement Estimate

messages.body: Hello, Attached you'll find the settlement estimated from my Erie insurance for my roof at 12009 Kemps Landing Cir Manassas VA 20109. Thanks

denialText: Erie insurance settlement estimate issued for claim A00006258004 at 12009 Kemps Landing Cir, Manassas VA 20109 — settlement amount in attached PDF.
carrierTactic: Erie's standard settlement delivery — direct to homeowner. No adjuster name in this thread (would be on the PDF).
patentMapping: Erie was not in the Insurance Journal top-3 patent holders. Likely uses Verisk/CoreLogic vendor patents (US10089396 Accurence, US20190304026 Betterview) rather than in-house ML. Erie tends to have shorter/simpler estimates — less AI-driven boilerplate, more human-adjuster-driven.
lessonForAnalyzer: Erie thread is THIN — only the homeowner forward exists, the actual estimate is in the attached PDF. For full intel, the PDF needs OCR (which we now have via the transcribe endpoint). Future improvement: when a homeowner forwards a claim PDF, auto-transcribe and store.
